title: X-Fatty-Bouncy Spanish Pecorino-Romano Monsoon Tagine
description: This keto-friendly X-Fatty-Bouncy Spanish Pecorino-Romano Monsoon Tagine features a blend of creamy pecorino-romano and crispy fried elements, perfect for snacking or as a light dinner.
instructions: Heat fry oil in cazuela to medium-high heat.
Add chopped onion and garlic, sauté for 2 minutes or until softened.
Stir in pecorino-romano cheese and paprika powder; mix well until melted and blended with the onion-garlic mixture.
Pour coconut milk over the mixture and stir to combine evenly.
Simmer on low heat for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally until thickened slightly.
Add thyme leaves and cumin seeds, stir gently, and remove from heat immediately.
Serve hot as a snack or light dinner dish.
